name: Global-e Cross-Border E-Commerce API
what_it_does: Global-e REST API for cross-border e-commerce enablement platform. Enables AI agents to manage international checkout localization and currency conversion, handle landed cost calculation including duties, taxes, and shipping, access international shipping rate shopping across 200+ countries, retrieve customs documentation and HS code classification, manage country-specific payment method integration, handle international returns management and pre-paid labels, access country compliance and restricted items checking, retrieve localized product catalog and pricing data, manage international order routing and fulfillment, and integrate cross-border commerce with Shopify, Salesforce Commerce Cloud, and Magento.
use_cases: Managing international checkout localization from cross-border e-commerce agents
Calculating landed costs including duties and taxes from international shipping agents
Handling international returns from global fulfillment automation agents
Integrating cross-border commerce with Shopify from international DTC agents
not_for: Domestic-only retail without international cross-border shipping
B2B freight and logistics without consumer DTC cross-border focus
Digital goods delivery without physical product international shipping
best_when: A DTC brand or e-commerce merchant using Global-e wants AI agents to automate international checkout, landed cost calculation, customs documentation, country-specific payment localization, and cross-border returns.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Landed cost calculation errors cause shipment holds and unexpected recipient charges — duty underestimation damages customer trust. International restricted items and prohibited goods must be verified per country before shipping. HS code misclassification causes customs delays and penalties.

auth.notes: Global-e uses API key and OAuth for platform integrations. Merchant account credentials with order, catalog, and shipping scopes. Partner integration documentation. Webhooks for order and shipping events. Native Shopify, Salesforce Commerce Cloud, and Magento integrations. White-label checkout available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — revenue share on international GMV
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share model: percentage of international sales GMV; custom pricing for enterprise
pricing.notes: Petah Tikva, Israel. Founded 2013. NYSE: GLBE. Cross-border e-commerce platform. $2.4B revenue (2024). 900+ premium brands including Marks & Spencer and Childrenswear Group. 200+ countries, 100+ currencies. DHL Ecommerce partnership. Competes with Borderfree and ESW for cross-border enablement.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per merchant account; checkout optimization for low latency

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: HS code classification is merchant responsibility — automated classification must be reviewed for restricted categories
Landed cost accuracy — duty and tax estimates are pre-calculated; final amounts may differ at customs for some countries
No public MCP server — enterprise platform integration with partner portal access
Prohibited items per country — automated catalog must filter restricted products before checkout by destination country
Revenue share model — integration requires commercial agreement before API access
Checkout latency — cross-border localization adds latency to checkout; optimize for page performance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cross-border order and payment data. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, SOC2. API key. EU/US/IL. International order and customs data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cross-border e-commerce data. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, SOC2. API key. EU/US/IL. International order and payment data.
